analysis.summary: The team discussed prioritizing feature developments, identifying vulnerability management and Kubernetes-related integrations as top priorities. They planned to finalize selections for the Plan and CI/CD categories to meet an upcoming Tuesday deadline.
key_points: Prioritization of vulnerability management as a top focus area.
Significant investment and focus on Kubernetes and Terraform integrations.
Categorization of Kubernetes agents and HashiCorp integrations under a 'GitOps' bucket.
Selection of potential items from 'Plan' and 'CI/CD' categories, specifically the Pipeline editor.
action_items: Review and select specific items from the Plan and CI/CD categories.
Finalize the plan/submission by the Tuesday deadline.
key_decisions: Vulnerability management is ranked as the number one priority.
Kubernetes, KDS agents, and HashiCorp integrations will be grouped together as 'GitOps'.
The Pipeline editor will be included as an option for the CI/CD category.
